entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Center for Semi-Arid Tropics, the organization maintaining the germplasm collection

entities.name: ARACHIS GERMPLASM COLLECTION
entities.description: A substantial collection of 14,723 Arachis accessions

entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Cultivated peanut, Arachis hypogaea L., comprising 14,310 accessions

entities.name: WILD ARACHIS SPECIES
entities.description: Wild species of Arachis representing 43 taxa

entities.name: VAR HYPOGAEA
entities.description: A variety of cultivated peanut making up 45% of the collection

entities.name: VAR VULGARIS
entities.description: A variety of cultivated peanut making up 35.7% of the collection

entities.name: VAR FASTIGIATA
entities.description: A variety of cultivated peanut making up 16.1% of the collection

entities.name: VAR HIRSUTA
entities.description: A variety of peanut represented by 20 accessions

entities.name: VAR AEQUATORIANA
entities.description: A variety of peanut represented by 15 accessions

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of 1704 A. hypogaea accessions

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The genetic variation present within the Arachis collection

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: A parameter used for evaluating the core collection

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to biological stressors evaluated in the core collection

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to non-biological stressors evaluated in the core and wild collections

entities.name: QUALITY PARAMETERS
entities.description: General quality characteristics evaluated in the core collection

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A specific quality parameter regarding fungal toxin presence

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Polymorphic markers used for prescreening and diversity assessments

entities.name: PRESCREENING
entities.description: The process of using molecular markers on a subset of the core collection

entities.name: DIVERSITY ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating genetic diversity across Arachis taxa

entities.name: GERMPLASM EXCHANGE AND ACQUISITION
entities.description: Future efforts to expand and share the germplasm collection
